## Title: Fix stack buffer overflow in X2AP eNB instance initialization

### Summary
The X2AP eNB instance initialization code in `x2ap_eNB.c` lacked validation of the `num_cc` (number of component carriers) parameter received from the registration request. An unbounded value could exceed the `MAX_NUM_CCs` constant (defined as 8), leading to stack buffer overflows in downstream operations that use `num_cc` to index into fixed-size arrays. This fix adds an explicit bounds check before initializat
